'''âj-v-h-v''' ('''kajavhevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forcut|forcut]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forcut|forcut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-v-h-v
|-
! Lemma
| kajavhevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijavhevoko|thijavhevoko]] || [[word:jijavhevoko|jijavhevoko]] || [[word:shijavhevoko|shijavhevoko]] || [[word:kijavhevoko|kijavhevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujavhevoko|thuthujavhevoko]] || [[word:jujujavhevoko|jujujavhevoko]] || [[word:shushujavhevoko|shushujavhevoko]] || [[word:kukujavhevoko|kukujavhevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujavhevoko|thujavhevoko]] || [[word:jujavhevoko|jujavhevoko]] || [[word:shujavhevoko|shujavhevoko]] || [[word:kujavhevoko|kujavhevoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojavhevoko|thothojavhevoko]] || [[word:jojojavhevoko|jojojavhevoko]] || [[word:shoshojavhevoko|shoshojavhevoko]] || [[word:kokojavhevoko|kokojavhevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojavhevoko|thojavhevoko]] || [[word:jojavhevoko|jojavhevoko]] || [[word:shojavhevoko|shojavhevoko]] || [[word:kojavhevoko|kojavhevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjavhevoko|thĂŠjavhevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjavhevoko|jĂŠjavhevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjavhevoko|shĂŠjavhevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjavhevoko|kĂŠjavhevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajavhevoko|thathajavhevoko]] || [[word:jajajavhevoko|jajajavhevoko]] || [[word:shashajavhevoko|shashajavhevoko]] || [[word:kakajavhevoko|kakajavhevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajavhevoko|thajavhevoko]] || [[word:jajavhevoko|jajavhevoko]] || [[word:shajavhevoko|shajavhevoko]] || [[word:kajavhevoko|kajavhevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajavhevoko|thajavhevoko]] || [[word:jajavhevoko|jajavhevoko]] || [[word:shajavhevoko|shajavhevoko]] || [[word:kajavhevoko|kajavhevoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
